title: Known type with missing required fields
description: A MessagePart with a known type string (e.g., 'text') but missing required fields (e.g., no 'text' field). Serde deserialization should fail gracefully, the runner should log the failure, and polling should continue.
production_scenario: OpenCode API version change drops a required field, or a partial write leaves a part with only the type discriminator. The runner must not panic or stop polling.
